title: Each Dream Points to the Grand Line
description: On pages 22–25, each dream points to the grand line focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
scene: On pages 22–25, each dream points to the grand line focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you really worth 30 million belli?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph, looks like your luck's come to an end.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The entire govern-ment is after your head, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Luffy! Run for it or we'll be trapped on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: A huge- ass storm's coming in!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So this is what Nami was talking about!

summary: This part closes East Blue with a storm-driven escape and the crew’s first real step toward the Grand Line.
